name: Chocolate Mousse- Master Chefs
recipeIngredient: Melted and cooled to room temperature
recipeInstructions:
For Mousse:
1. Heat sugar and water in a heavy saucepan over medium-low heat until the sugar dissolves. Stir occasionally and use a brush dipped in cold water to clean any crystals from the sides of the pan.
2. Increase the heat and bring the mixture to 240°F (soft ball stage) on a candy thermometer.
3. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites and cream of tartar until soft peaks form.
4. Slowly pour in the hot syrup while beating to cool the mixture for about 5 minutes.
5. Gently fold in the whipped cream, cocoa powder, melted semi-sweet chocolate, and espresso powder.
6. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving.
(Note: The original recipe text has been rewritten to maintain clarity and consistency with no additional ingredients or steps added.)
